title: uragoga ruiziana
side_effects: Uragoga ruiziana can have side effects if used improperly, such as gastrointestinal issues, including nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea, due to its potent alkaloid content. Prolonged use or excessive consumption may also lead to cardiovascular problems, including increased heart rate and blood pressure. Additionally, uragoga ruiziana may interact with other medications, causing adverse reactions such as dizziness, headaches, and fatigue. In severe cases, improper use of this plant can even cause respiratory distress, seizures, or even coma.
